name: Node.js (alindesign)
description: Ubuntu base + alindesign dotfiles (zsh, starship, CLI tools) + Node.js (via mise) with a configurable package manager (pnpm by default).

nodeVersion.description: Node version (passed to the node feature).

gitUserName.description: git user.name (optional; can also be set after the fact).

gitUserEmail.description: git user.email (optional; can also be set after the fact).
